title: Create:Butter Cat
description: Create: Butter Cat bring the classic "Butter Cat Paradox" into the Minecraft world with the power of Create.
body:
## Create: Butter Cat

_"A cat always lands on its feet, and buttered toast always lands butter-side down. So what happens if you strap buttered toast to a cat's back?" — The Butter Cat Paradox_


**✨ Butter Cat Engine**

A brand new Create component that generates rotational power using butter as fuel.

Butter Powered: Add butter to generate rotational force. The more butter, the faster it spins

Infinite Mode: Use Super Butter to make the engine run forever

Comparator Output: Redstone signal strength based on butter level

Arm Interaction: Compatible with Mechanical Arms for automatic butter refilling


**🧈 Butter**

The mod adds a complete butter production chain:

Cream: A new fluid, processed using a Create Mixer

Butter: Basic fuel, crafted from cream

Honey Butter: Enhanced fuel, equivalent to two units of regular butter

Super Butter: Ultimate fuel that enables infinite engine operation


**🧴 Spinning**

Eating butter or drinking a Spinning Potion makes you spin around — maybe the animals would like a taste too?


## 机械动力：黄油猫

_“猫总是四脚着地，黄油吐司总是黄油面朝下，那么把黄油吐司绑在猫背上，会发生什么？” —— 黄油猫悖论_


**✨ 黄油猫引擎**

黄油驱动：通过添加黄油产生旋转动力，黄油越多转速越快

无限模式：使用超级黄油让引擎无限运转

比较器输出：根据黄油存量输出红石信号强度

动力臂交互：支持动力臂自动添加黄油


**🧈 黄油**

模组添加了完整的黄油生产链：

奶油：新的流体，可通过机械动力搅拌器加工

黄油：基础燃料，奶油加工而成

蜂蜜黄油：加工燃料，效力相当两个黄油

超级黄油：超级燃料，可让引擎无限运转


**🧴旋转**

吃下黄油或是旋转药水让你开始原地旋转，或许也可以让动物们尝尝？
